language.help: Choose a fixed language, or use the browser language automatically.

backup.title: Database backups
backup.subtitle: Manual and automatic backups of the active SQLite database.
backup.checked_hourly: Checked hourly by the scheduler, created only when the configured interval is reached.
backup.interval_help: Maximum frequency for automatic backup creation.
backup.retention_help: Oldest backups are pruned automatically after new runs.
backup.restore_text: Restoring a backup replaces the active SQLite database with the selected backup. Before restoring, Memoria automatically creates a fresh safety backup of the current database.
backup.restore_confirm: Restore this backup and replace the active database? A safety backup of the current database will be created first.
